title: March community event: Behind the scenes of monday.com automations
excerpt: You are invited to join our March community event and get the inside scoop on all things automations. This event will be led by the very talented monday.com product manager Amichay Even Chen. Amichay will take you throug…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
You are invited to join our March community event and get the inside scoop on all things automations. This event will be led by the very talented monday.com product manager Amichay Even Chen. Amichay will take you through the in-and-outs of automation, share some tips and give some insight into the future world of monday.com automation.

Since many of our members are all over the globe, we are having 2 LIVE sessions:

Behind the scenes - automations (1)1920×1920 111 KB

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone, quick update here.

Unfortunately we had to move the event on March 29th to April 19th. Our event on March 30 will remain! If you already signed up for the time on March 29th your registration has automatically transferred to the new time!
